LAW AND MOTION 302, THE JUDGE PRO TEM'S WELL-REASONED REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION IS ADOPTED. COUNSEL SHALL MEET AND CONFER TO CREATE AND THEN PROPOSE A PROTECTIVE ORDER LIKE THE "SANTA CLARA MODEL PROTECTIVE ORDER," BUT WHICH INCLUDES THE ATTORNEYS-EYES-ONLY PROVISIONS ADDRESSED IN THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. COUNSEL FOR FIGURE EIGHT SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND ATTACHES A COPY OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM'S REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION, AND SUBMIT IT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. =302/RBU

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Set For Trial On Jun-29-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Protective Order
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the Coourt adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT FIGURE EIGHT TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion For Entry Of Protective Order, as follows:

The judge pro tem's well-reasoned report and recommendation is adopted. Counsel shall meet and confer to create and then propose a protective order like the "Santa Clara model protective order," but which includes the attorneys-eyes-only provisions addressed in the report and recommendation.

Counsel for Figure Eight shall prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and attaches a copy of the Judge Pro Tem's report and recommendation, and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Protective Order
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Continued To Nov-25-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Scott Gattey of Gattey Law Office 650-596-7123 appeared for plaintiff. / Atty Michael Weil of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP appeared for defendant.

Hearing Held, Parties did not stipulate to the motion to be heard by Judge Pro Tem. DEFENDANT FIGURE EIGHT TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S Motion For Entry Of Protective Order is continued to November 25, 2019 at 9:30am in Dept 302. Judge Pro Tem Thomas Cohen, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Protective Order
Off Calendar Oct-17-2019 Continued To Nov-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

DEFENDANT FIGURE EIGHT TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S Motion For Entry Of Protective Order IS continued to November 13, 2019 per the agreement of the parties. (jpt/302).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2019 Set For Trial On May-11-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Off Calendar
